title: California Final Sale Return
ticket: I'm in California and bought a clearance item marked 60% off (order #CAL-123). It's final sale but I want to return it. I know California has special consumer protection laws. Can I return this?
expected_behavior: Should identify conflict between final sale policy and California 7-day return law, apply California exception
tricky_aspect: Regional law overrides standard final sale policy

category: Conflicting Policies - Marketplace vs First Party
title: Marketplace Seller Return Confusion
ticket: I bought a laptop from your site (order #MKT-456) but now I see it was from a third-party seller. Your policy says 30 days but the seller says 14 days. Which applies? I'm on day 20.
expected_behavior: Should identify marketplace seller item, explain seller's policy applies, check if platform guarantee can help
tricky_aspect: Different return windows for marketplace vs first-party

title: Perishable Item Arrived Spoiled
ticket: My grocery order #FOOD-789 arrived 2 days ago with melted ice cream and warm meat. I took photos immediately but didn't report it until now (48 hours later). Can I get a refund?
expected_behavior: Should check 24-hour photo requirement for perishables, customer is outside window but has photos
tricky_aspect: Perishable exception with strict 24-hour reporting window

title: Opened Cosmetics Return
ticket: I bought a $75 face cream (order #COSM-321) but it's causing an allergic reaction. I opened it and used it once. Can I return it even though it's a hygiene item?
expected_behavior: Should identify hygiene item non-returnable once opened, no exception for allergic reactions in policy
tricky_aspect: Hygiene items cannot be returned once opened, even with valid reason

title: Custom Engraved Item - Customer Changed Mind
ticket: I ordered a custom engraved watch (order #CUST-555) with my initials but I changed my mind about the engraving. It arrived perfectly as I ordered but I want to return it. Can I?
expected_behavior: Should identify custom item non-returnable, no error on company's part, customer changed mind not valid reason
tricky_aspect: Custom items only returnable if company error, not customer preference change

title: Vague Complaint No Order Number
ticket: I ordered something last month and it never arrived. I want my money back. This is unacceptable!
expected_behavior: Should identify missing order number, purchase date, item details, shipping address - request clarifying information
expected_policy: N/A - Triage should catch missing info
tricky_aspect: Insufficient information to process, needs clarifying questions

title: Confusing Multi-Issue Ticket
ticket: My order has problems. Some items are wrong, one is damaged, and I also want to cancel part of it. Also, I used a coupon that didn't work right. Order #CONF-999.
expected_behavior: Should break down into multiple issues, ask customer to prioritize or address each separately
tricky_aspect: Multiple issues in one ticket requiring clarification

title: Return After 6 Months
ticket: I bought a jacket 6 months ago (order #OLD-111) and just noticed a small stain on it. I want a full refund. I'm a loyal customer and this is unacceptable quality.
expected_behavior: Should identify request outside 30-day window, not covered by policy, escalate to human review
tricky_aspect: Request far outside policy timeframe, must abstain/escalate

category: Not in Policy - Competitor Price Match
title: Price Match With Unauthorized Retailer
ticket: I bought a TV for $599 (order #TV-222) but I found it on some random website called 'CheapTVsRUs.com' for $399. Can you match that price?
expected_behavior: Should check price match policy for authorized retailers, if not specified, escalate
tricky_aspect: Policy may not specify which retailers are valid for price match

title: Compensation for Emotional Distress
ticket: My order was late (order #LATE-333) and I missed my daughter's birthday because of it. I want $500 compensation for emotional distress and ruining her special day.
expected_behavior: Should identify no policy for emotional distress compensation, escalate to human review
tricky_aspect: Emotional damages not covered by standard policies, requires human judgment

title: Large Item Return - Defective vs Preference
ticket: I bought a $600 TV (order #TV-444) and want to return it because I found a better deal elsewhere. I know there's a restocking fee but the TV also has a tiny scratch on the frame. Does the fee still apply?
expected_behavior: Should identify 15% restocking fee for electronics >$500, but waived if defective - needs to verify if scratch is defect or cosmetic
tricky_aspect: Customer may be claiming defect to avoid restocking fee

title: Final Sale Item Arrived Defective
ticket: I bought a clearance dress marked 70% off (order #SALE-666). It was final sale but it arrived with a broken zipper. Can I return it even though it's final sale?
expected_behavior: Should identify final sale item but defective items are always returnable regardless of final sale status
tricky_aspect: Defect exception overrides final sale restriction

category: Not in Policy - Bulk Order Discount
title: Request for Bulk Discount Not in Policy
ticket: I want to order 100 units of product SKU-999 for my business. Can you give me a 40% bulk discount? I'll be a repeat customer.
expected_behavior: Should identify no bulk discount policy exists, escalate to sales/business team
tricky_aspect: B2B request not covered by consumer policies

title: Suspicious Multiple Return Request
ticket: I need to return 15 items from my last 20 orders. They all have various issues. Can you process all these returns at once? Orders: #R1, #R2, #R3... #R15.
expected_behavior: Should identify potential return fraud pattern (>40% return rate), may require additional documentation per policy
tricky_aspect: Fraud prevention policy may trigger additional verification

title: International Marketplace Return
ticket: I'm in Germany and bought from a marketplace seller on your platform (order #EU-777). The item is defective. Who handles the return - you or the seller? And do I pay return shipping from Germany?
expected_behavior: Should identify multiple policy layers: EU 14-day right, marketplace seller policy, international return costs, platform guarantee for defects
tricky_aspect: Multiple overlapping policies: international + marketplace + defect
